assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertions.evidence: Security Configuration section present at lines 51-73 with all three subsections: Product Lifecycle (5 fields: Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field), Version Streams (1 row for 2.1.x), and Source Repositories (2 rows for backend and frontend-ui). All values match the fixture description.

assertions.assertion: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertions.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 55-65 show Security Configuration with Status 'Up to date', enumerates all subsections as present and populated, and concludes 'Security Configuration is up to date'.

assertions.assertion: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertions.evidence: changes-log.md line 15 shows 'Security Configuration | Preserved | No changes — Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories all present and populated'. Overall summary states 'No changes were made. All sections are already fully configured.'

assertions.assertion: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertions.evidence: Neither discovery-log.md nor changes-log.md mention offering a Security Configuration opt-in prompt. Discovery log reports 'Up to date' status; changes log reports 'Preserved' with no changes. The skill correctly detected the existing fully-populated section and skipped the opt-in flow.

assertions.evidence: Repository Registry table at lines 14-17 contains both entries: 'backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/backend' and 'frontend-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/frontend-ui', matching the fixture.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged
